calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem David M. Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Respondent, Lorenzo Sac Equioij, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Gene C. Padilla, is not present but sends a representative, Jessica Ramirez .
Carlos Torres, appears as a translator for Mr. Equioij, to translate Spanisb to English, and English to Spanish.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
10:37am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence is admitted.
